pkgmetadata.longdescription: SourceMapParse JavaScript source maps. import sourcemap sourcemap.discover(...) jquery.min.map index sourcemap.loads(...) index.lookup(line10, column10) Token dst_line10 dst_column10 srcjquery.js src_line50 src_col200 namelolcopyright (c) 2013 by Matt Robenoltlicense BSD, see LICENSE for more details.
